content.en:
After killing this ink demon, Ye Tian contacted his black immortal senior brother.

After all, if you can, you should help Senior Brother Black Decay.

After contacting Senior Brother Black Decay and determining Senior Brother Black Immortal's location, Ye Tian immediately cast a flash shadow to shuttle over.

......

"Trouble!"

The Black Rotten Master's brow furrowed.

He encountered eight ink demons, each of which was a little stronger than him, and the eight ink demons together were enough to kill him.

Of course, it will take a long time to kill him, after all, he is not weak.

However, he didn't want to pass the first round of assessment of the Daoless Tower.

"It's too difficult to join the Wudao Tower, I'm afraid it won't work right now, or practice in the Eternal Ruins for a long time, maybe there is still hope to join the forces of the level of the Wudao Tower in the future. "

The Black Rotten Ruler said secretly.

Just as he was about to give up, a figure appeared.

"Little junior brother!"

The Black Rotten Ruler was surprised.

Then, an even more shocking scene occurred.

I saw Ye Tian casually slash at the body of an ink demon, directly beating the ink demon into a state of heavy injury and dying.

"Senior Brother Black Decay, hurry up and kill this ink demon!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, junior brother!"

The Black Decay Controller hurriedly thanked him, and immediately struck out to kill the heavily injured and dying ink demon.

Immediately, he put away the corpse of the ink demon.

At this moment, he was extremely shocked.

He knew very well that the little junior brother had not yet made a full move, for example, the perfect body had not been used.

It is conceivable that once the little junior brother makes a full move, it is enough to kill an ink demon in an instant.

"Little junior brother is many times stronger than before!"

The Black Decay Controller sighed secretly, and was also stimulated!

They are both Ten Realm-level controllers, why is there such a big gap between them?

"Senior Brother Black Decay, let's go out!"

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Black Rotten Ruler nodded.

Subsequently, they continued to shuttle, perceiving the space-time passage, and thus returned to the city of no distance.

Time passed slowly, but there were very few Ten Realm-level masters who succeeded in killing the Ink Demon.

After a long time, the first round of assessment is over, and some of the Ten Realm-level controllers who are still in the Ink Demon Realm have not killed a single Ink Demon yet, and even some of the Ten Realm-level Masters who are hiding and want to pick up the leaks have been directly eliminated.

And not long after, the assessment on the side of the half-step perfect controller was also over.

However, the assessment over there was under the jurisdiction of another perfect controller, and it had nothing to do with Ye Tian's side.

Soon.

The Lord of the Blood Separation announced the results.

"This time, there are 1,566 people who have passed the assessment among the Ten Realm-level Controllers, and the rest of the Ten Realm-level Masters have all been eliminated, you can leave!" the Lord of Blood Separation announced.

"What, only so few people have passed the assessment?"

Many Ten Realm-level Masters were extremely shocked.

There were more than one million Ten Realm-level controllers who came to participate in the assessment this time, but I didn't expect that only 1,566 people passed the assessment.

And this is only the first round of assessments, who knows what other assessments will follow, and there are definitely not many Ten Realm-level controllers who have finally passed.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Blood Separation took more than a thousand Ten-Realm level masters to a palace in the Boundless City.

In the middle of this palace there is a large stone mirror.

At this time, the Lord of Blood Separation introduced: "This is the perfect treasure - the talent mirror, it has only one function, that is, it can test your talent value, the talent value is determined by your talent, if the talent is average, the talent value will be very low." The talent value represents the potential to a certain extent, for example, if some Eternal Controllers have a large number of Controlling Ancestral Endowments, the talent values will be very high, and such Eternal Controllers have great potential even if their strength is slightly worse. "

"Lord of Blood, what is the talent value to pass this round?"

A Ten Realm-level master asked curiously.

"1000 talent stats!"

The Lord of Blood.

Soon.

A Ten Realm-level master went up to test it.

"Talent value 289!"

The Lord of Blood Separation read the numbers on the Talent Mirror and said.

Obviously, such a talent has a low value.

The fact that he can become a Ten Realms-level controller with a low talent value means that this Ten Realms-level controller can only reach this level by relying on countless resources and endless years of cultivation, which does not mean that he is really demonic.

"Lord of Blood, this is not fair, my strength is also very strong, why do I have to ask for talent values?" said the Ten Realm-level Controller.

"Get out!"

With a wave of his hand, the Lord of Blood Separation directly moved the other party away and threw him into an unknown place.

Immediately, the Lord of Blood Separation said: "Although the talent value is low, you can still become a half-step perfect controller, and even if you are unlucky, there is hope for becoming a perfect controller, but how many resources are needed? Moreover, if you are not satisfied with this assessment requirement, you can leave, the Daoless Tower is not forced, it is you who want to join the Wudao Tower, not the Wudao Tower begging you to join, understand?"

After saying that, the Lord of Blood Separation asked many Ten Realm-level masters to continue the test.

At this time, the Black Decay Controller was very nervous.

In the first round, Ye Tian could still help him, but this round couldn't help, so he could only rely on himself.

In fact, Ye Tian could also help him, just throw him a perfect-level ancestral endowment, and then it would be done.

However, it was impossible for him to expose his talent, after all, the Black Decay Controller was not his family, so he would not be so stupid.

As for whether the Black Decay Controller can pass this round, it depends on the Black Decay Controller himself.

"Talent value 598!"

"Talent value 1029!"

"Talent value 888!"

One by one, the Ten Realm-level Masters went up to the test, but there were too few Ten Realm-level Masters who could reach a talent value of 1000!

After a long time, it was finally the turn of the Black Rotten Master.

He walked up nervously, touched the talent mirror with both hands, and began to test.

Rumble!

The talent mirror glowed, and a number appeared on it.

"Talent value 1006!"

The Lord of Blood Separation announced.

Seeing this number, the Black Decay Controller breathed a sigh of relief, his luck was not bad, and he barely passed the second round of assessments.

The Black Decay Controller passed, and Ye Tian was naturally very pleased.

"It seems that the talent of the Black Decay Controller is not bad, and the talent of the master should also be very good, but it is a pity that the foundation of the person who grew up in the Origin Realm Sea is a little worse, so his combat effectiveness is not strong. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon after, it was Ye Tian's turn.

He walked up very calmly.

He knew very well that once he tested it, his talent value would inevitably shock everyone, even the Lord of Blood, but in order to join the Daoless Tower, the exposure would also be exposed.
